sections.instruction: Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer. For questions 9 and 10, choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: Country of destination: Ireland Name: Tim (1) {{BLANK}} Address to be collected from: (2) {{BLANK}}
What is the minimum recommended cover by the agency?
Where does the customer want the goods delivered?

sections.instruction: Label the plan below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. What does the tour guide tell her tour group about each of the following places on the day’s itinerary. Write correct letter A, B or C next to questions 16-20. NB You may choose any letter more than once.

questions.content: Match the places to the tour guide's statement.
options: A They will definitely go there
B They might go there if time allows
C They certainly won't go there

sections.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.content: Gyroscopes are used in laser devices and are found in many consumer (21) {{BLANK}} The purpose of the project is to design a functional, (22) {{BLANK}} and beneficial consumer product. The gyroscopic exercise ball can be set in motion by movements of the (23) {{BLANK}} and wrist together in sync. The gyroscopic ball could help people in (24) {{BLANK}} who have lower are injuries. The product could also be aimed at (25) {{BLANK}} for whom lower arm strength is very important.

sections.instruction: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Complete the sentences below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.

options: A always try to wing it
A with friends who can advise you
B with all the equipment you plan on using

questions.content: It is a good idea to
options: A be discreet with you audience
C meet and welcome your audience

questions.content: Taking a few deep breaths before you begin
options: A will stop you having a panic attack
B will guarantee that you feel more relaxed
C will help turn your tension into enthusiasm

questions.content: • Try to (36) {{BLANK}} yourself making a speech and imagine your voice loud and confident • Even if you make mistakes avoid making (37) {{BLANK}} • Pay attention to your (38) {{BLANK}} your words carry less meaning than your delivery • People usually remember less than (39) {{BLANK}} of what they hear • Be (40) {{BLANK}} about yourself; You don’t become a perfect speaker overnight
